sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48154" key="qeognwsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεο-γνωσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48154.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the knowledge of God</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:20p.463M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20p.463M.</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
